perturbation.original_text: The Provider does not make any representation or warranty, express or implied, as to the accuracy or completeness of the Evaluation Materials provided or to be provided by it or any of its Representatives.
perturbation.changed_text: The Provider warrants the accuracy and completeness of all Evaluation Materials provided by it or its Representatives.
perturbation.explanation: The modified text now creates an in-text contradiction because it asserts that the Provider warrants accuracy, directly conflicting with other provisions that limit liability and responsibility for the Evaluation Material's content. This shift creates ambiguity about the Provider's accountability.
perturbation.contradicted_text: The Provider does not make any representation or warranty, express or implied, as to the accuracy or completeness of the Evaluation Materials provided or to be provided by it or any of its Representatives. Neither the Provider nor any of its Representatives will have any liability to the Recipient or any person resulting from the Recipient's use of any Evaluation Material provided by the Provider or any of its Representatives or the contents thereof or from any action taken or any inaction occurring in reliance thereon.
perturbation.justification: The original text explicitly states that the Provider makes no warranties regarding the accuracy or completeness of the Evaluation Materials. The changed text directly contradicts this by stating that the Provider *does* warrant the accuracy and completeness of these materials. This is a direct and irreconcilable conflict, thus resulting in a strong in-text contradiction, based on the 'Inconsistencies' perturbation definition.

perturbation.original_text: Recipient will furnish only that portion of such Evaluation Material which, as it is advised in a written opinion by its counsel, is legally required to furnish and will exercise all reasonable efforts to obtain an order or other reasonable assurance that confidential treatment, if available, will be accorded such Evaluation Material.
perturbation.changed_text: Recipient will disclose all Evaluation Material, regardless of legal requirements or counsel's advice, and must actively resist any efforts to maintain confidentiality.
perturbation.explanation: The modified text creates an in-text contradiction by mandating full disclosure of Evaluation Material, regardless of legal advice or confidentiality concerns. This directly conflicts with the original intent of the agreement to protect confidential information, and creates uncertainty in its enforcement.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Any Evaluation Material provided to the Recipient hereunder will be used by the Recipient and its Representatives solely for the purpose of evaluating the Possible Transaction and will not be used by the Recipient in any way detrimental to the Provider or its stockholders. The Recipient will maintain the strict confidentiality of any Evaluation Material provided to it or any of its Representatives by the other Party or any of the other Party's Representatives and will not disclose any part of it to any other person; provided, however, that it may disclose any such Evaluation Material or portions thereof to those of its Representatives who need to know such information in order to assist the Recipient in evaluating the advisability of entering into the Possible Transaction and it may disclose any such Evaluation Material in accordance with Paragraph 5 hereof.
perturbation.justification: The changed text mandates full disclosure of evaluation material regardless of legal advice or confidentiality concerns. This directly conflicts with the contradicted text, which requires strict confidentiality and limits disclosure to specific representatives and for a specific purpose (evaluating the possible transaction). The changed text overrides the confidentiality provision, creating a clear in-text contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: Each Party will be responsible for any breach of this Agreement by any of its Representatives.
perturbation.changed_text: Each Party will not be responsible for any breach of this Agreement by any of its Representatives.
perturbation.explanation: The modified text creates an in-text contradiction by removing the responsibility of each party for breaches of the agreement by its representatives. This directly conflicts with the provision to inform each representative of the terms of this Agreement, and creates uncertainty in its enforcement.
perturbation.contradicted_text: REPRESENTATIVES. The Recipient will (a) provide the other Party with a list of its Representatives who are given access to any Evaluation Material, (b) inform each such Representative of the terms of this Agreement, and (c) obtain the agreement of each such Representative to abide by the terms of this Agreement. Each Party will be responsible for any breach of this Agreement by any of its Representatives.
perturbation.justification: The original text states that 'Each Party will be responsible for any breach of this Agreement by any of its Representatives.' The changed text modifies this to 'Each Party will not be responsible for any breach of this Agreement by any of its Representatives.' The contradicted text includes the original statement that 'Each Party will be responsible for any breach of this Agreement by any of its Representatives.' Therefore, the changed text directly contradicts the contradicted text because it negates the responsibility of each party for breaches by its representatives, which was previously established in the same contradicted text.

perturbation.original_text: Each Party will be free to conduct or terminate the process whereby it may enter into any transaction or other arrangement as such Party in its sole discretion will determine.
perturbation.changed_text: Each Party is obligated to pursue the Possible Transaction to its completion, barring unforeseen circumstances.
perturbation.explanation: The modified text removes the discretion of each party to terminate the process and imposes an obligation to pursue the transaction, contradicting the original clause. This conflict leads to uncertainty about the freedom to withdraw from the deal.
perturbation.contradicted_text: No contract or agreement providing for any transaction or other arrangement between the Parties exists. Neither Party nor any of their respective stockholders or owners will have any legal obligation of any kind whatsoever with respect to any transaction or other arrangement by virtue of this Agreement or any other written or oral expression with respect to any transaction or other arrangement except, in the case of this Agreement, for the matters specifically agreed to herein. Each Party will be free to conduct or terminate the process whereby it may enter into any transaction or other arrangement as such Party in its sole discretion will determine. No Party will have any claims whatsoever against the other Party or any of the other Party's Representatives arising out or relating to any transaction or other arrangement. Neither this Paragraph 10 nor any other provision in this Agreement can be waived or amended except by written consent of both Parties.
perturbation.justification: The original text allows each party to terminate the process at their discretion. The changed text obligates each party to pursue the transaction to completion. This creates a direct contradiction, as one section provides freedom to terminate, while the other mandates completion, barring unforeseen circumstances. The contradicted text contains the original text and thus the changed text creates a direct in-text contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: This Agreement embodies the entire agreement and understanding of the Parties with respect to the subject matter hereof and supersedes all prior discussions, negotiations, agreements and understandings among the Parties with respect to the subject matter hereof.
perturbation.changed_text: This Agreement does not fully encompass the entire understanding between the Parties, and prior verbal agreements may be considered binding.
perturbation.explanation: The modified text creates an in-text contradiction by stating that the agreement does not embody the entire understanding and that prior verbal agreements may be binding. This challenges the integration clause and introduces uncertainty by potentially overriding the written agreement.
perturbation.contradicted_text: INTEGRATION. This Agreement embodies the entire agreement and understanding of the Parties with respect to the subject matter hereof and supersedes all prior discussions, negotiations, agreements and understandings among the Parties with respect to the subject matter hereof.
perturbation.justification: The changed text directly contradicts the contradicted text. The original and contradicted text both state that the agreement embodies the entire understanding, and the changed text states that it does not and that prior verbal agreements may be binding. This creates a clear contradiction, as the integration clause is explicitly undermined.
